name: lint-ui-density
command: cd site; pnpm exec eslint -c config/build/eslint.config.mjs features/planner/open3d/editor/TopBar.tsx features/planner/open3d/editor/WorkspaceShell.tsx features/planner/open3d/editor/OOPlannerWorkspace.tsx features/planner/open3d/editor/useDockingSystem.ts features/planner/open3d/editor/canvasTool.ts --max-warnings=0 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30
